text_block_list.name: Sky's Classmate
text_block_list.text: Oh, hey, Sei! The Droit's tomorrow,<n>huh? I decided to go too! Good luck!

text_block_list.name: Older Student
text_block_list.text: Sky, I heard you're performing with<n>Fuji. I'm so jealous. I can't wait to<n>see your dance.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Wow, feel that pressure. Maybe I<n>need to make a break for it.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Everyone should start the year<n>having fun... And I'll do everything I<n>can to make that happen.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: But never mind. I knew that together,<n>you and I would be able to bring the<n>biggest smiles to everyone.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: (It's just not my kinda show. I likebetraying expectations, not givingpeople a fun time, much less makingthem smile...)

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Uuunngh... Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Now then... our honeymoon has come<n>to an end. Sadly, this will be our last<n>lesson. Today we'll iron out the<n>details and get ready for tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: We've come along pretty well with<n>the routine I first suggested. Is there<n>anything you'd like to go over before<n>it's too late?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Sure, just one thing. Can we call the<n>whole thing off?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Uh... What?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh, you know, I just feel like quitting.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I really don't like living up to people'sexpectations. I'd rather... do a dancethat's more me.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: ...Sky!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: We'll have to start over from scratch,<n>if that's okay with you. So, would you<n>go to the dance with me?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Yes! I'd love to! Everyone's going to<n>love this surprise dance!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: (...They're actually dancing.Weird...)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: That's partner dancing? ...Wow.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Ah! That was...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Yeah! That was fantastic! It reallypacks a surprise! Hehe, I think I couldlike this a lot.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Now there's just the song.<n>Classical's the norm, but... that's too<n>rigid for the dance we just did.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Although, something too poppy<n>wouldn't fit the Droit at all. There<n>must be some kind of middle ground...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: (Sampling maybe? It needs a<n>classical vibe... so they don't want to<n>axe the strings.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: (Actually, the track I'm making now<n>could work. So long as they don't ask<n>for a live orchestra or something<n>crazy, it just needs some tweaking...)

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: You know, we don't even need a<n>song.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: What do you mean you don't need<n>one?!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Shakur! Are you okay? I wasn't<n>expecting you.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Don't even ask! Seiun Sky, did I just<n>hear you say "we don't even need a<n>song"?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh, uh, yeah, I mean...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: That's going way too far. Somerules are there for a reason. There'sno rhythm to get into without sound. Ifyou're looking for something tomatch that dance you did...

text_block_list.name: Fuji & Sky
text_block_list.text: Wooow!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Try dancing to this. I'll fix it up.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: (Yeah... This is it.)

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: That was really good! It felt so great<n>to dance to. Right, Sky?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I didn't know you composed music.<n>Do you by chance... put anything<n>online?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Nope.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Having Shakur's help with this is<n>tremendous! There's no time to lose.<n>Let's practice as hard as we can!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The night of the Ligne Droite...

text_block_list.name: Student Council General Manager
text_block_list.text: And so, thanks to the new additions<n>and extra announcements, there are<n>more attendees than ever before!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Good... Thank you for the report.<n>Let's make our way to the hall now.

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text: May I have your attention, please!<n>It's almost time for the feature of the<n>night, the partner dance, to begin!

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text: There's just one thing before that...<n>This year's Droit will be a little<n>different than before! I present to you<n>the pair who will be doing a special<n>exhibition dance!

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text: Fuji Kiseki and Seiun Sky!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Will all your effort have been worth it?<n>Time to find out.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: (Damn it. Why'd I stick my neck out?<n>Those two kept me busy until the<n>very last moment!)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I had to eat a ton of ramen to get that<n>live orchestra. This better be good.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Okay... Ready to go, my lovely date?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hehe, let's have some fun!
